executives.name: Harry You
executives.background: Mr. You has served as a director since 2019. He is the co-founder and Vice Chairman of dMY Technology Group. He previously served as CFO of EMC Corporation and EVP at Oracle Corporation.

tenure_dates.title: Chairman of the Board and CFO

executives.name: Niccolo de Masi
executives.background: Mr. de Masi has served as a member of our board of directors since December 2021. He was previously the CEO of dMY Technology Group, Inc. IV.
